shortDescription: A warm family dinner ritual for sharing daily highs and lows.
fullDescription:
Rose & Thorn helps families slow down at dinner and share the highs and lows of the day. One phone is passed around the table, each person records a Rose, a Thorn, and a gentle follow-up reflection, and the app saves a warm family history to revisit later.

The app is designed for a calm, offline-first ritual: no accounts, no ads, no analytics, and no required internet connection. Family names, member names, prompts, sessions, and artwork stay on the device in local storage unless you choose to export your history through the system share sheet.

Every entry includes procedural artwork by default. Optional on-device AI artwork can be enabled from Settings — choose between an on-device model (1.9 GB, fully offline) or Cloud AI using your own API key (opt-in, no data shared without your key).

Use Rose & Thorn to make daily gratitude, curiosity, and kindness easier to practice together.
